name: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop
description_short: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop Inc. operates three locations in Columbus, Ohio, providing collateral-based loans and pawn services with extended weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
E-Z Cash Pawn Shop Inc. is a regional pawn operation headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, with three established locations across the city. The company maintains a physical retail presence with distinct East, West, and Downtown branches, each operating under separate licensing identifiers (PB.100220.000, PB.100220.005-BR, and PB.100220.002-BR respectively), indicating regulatory compliance with Ohio pawn shop requirements.

Based on the available website information, E-Z Cash Pawn Shop offers standard pawn shop services typical of collateral-based lending operations. While specific service details are not itemized on their locations page, pawn shops generally provide short-term loans secured by personal property, precious metals and jewelry purchasing, and item redemption services. The company maintains consistent operating hours across locations, with Saturday availability and varying weekday closing times (5:30pm to 6:00pm).

The company distinguishes itself through multi-location accessibility within Columbus, allowing customers to conduct transactions at three different neighborhoods—East Columbus, West Columbus, and Downtown. This geographic distribution reduces travel burden for local customers. The longest operating hours are offered at the East Location (9:30am-6:00pm), while Downtown operates with the earliest opening time (9:00am). All locations maintain Saturday service, eliminating the need for weekday-only customers to take time off work.

E-Z Cash Pawn Shop operates in a legitimate, regulated industry with proper Ohio licensing. However, prospective customers should note that the website provides minimal detail about specific services, fee structures, loan terms, or interest rates. No information is available regarding loan amounts, repayment periods, redemption policies, or the types of collateral accepted. The company's online presence is limited to location and contact information, requiring direct phone contact or in-person visits for service details.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Three conveniently located branches across Columbus (East, West, and Downtown) reducing travel distance for local customers
Extended Saturday hours (9:00am-6:00pm) providing weekend access for working customers
Established business with proper Ohio pawn shop licensing across all three locations
East Location offers the latest closing time (6:00pm) compared to other branches
Downtown location opens earliest at 9:00am, accommodating early morning service needs
Direct phone contact available at each location for immediate inquiries and service details
cons: Website provides no information about loan amounts, terms, fees, or interest rates, requiring customers to call or visit in person for basic service details
No online description of accepted collateral types or redemption policies available
Limited digital presence with no details about appraisal processes, loan repayment terms, or default consequences
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials available on the provided website
Website lacks FAQ section or service documentation that would help customers understand pawn loan mechanics and costs before visiting
best_for: Columbus-area residents needing quick collateral-based loans with local retail access
Customers looking to sell or pawn precious metals, jewelry, or other personal property
People seeking weekend pawn shop services without traveling outside the Columbus area
diagnosis: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop is best for Columbus-area residents who need immediate access to collateral-based loans or want to sell personal property locally. The main caveat is that the website provides no transparency regarding loan terms, fees, interest rates, or specific policies—all critical information must be obtained through direct phone contact or in-person visits.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property collateral
Item redemption and loan repayment services
In-person customer service at three locations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
